Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import torch, torchvision, torchaudio, pytorch_lightning, albumentations, omegaconf, scipy, timm, cv2, pycocotools, numpy
print\('torch:', torch.__version__, '| CUDA available:', torch.cuda.is_available\(\), '| GPU:', torch.cuda.get_device_name\(0\) if torch.cuda.is_available\(\) else 'N/A'\)
print\('torchvision:', torchvision.__version__\)
print\('torchaudio:', torchaudio.__version__\)
print\('pytorch_lightning:', pytorch_lightning.__version__\)
print\('albumentations:', albumentations.__version__\)
print\('omegaconf:', omegaconf.__version__\)
print\('scipy:', scipy.__version__\)
print\('timm:', timm.__version__\)
print\('cv2:', cv2.__version__\)
print\('numpy:', numpy.__version__\)
print\('pycocotools: ok'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import numpy, torch, torchvision, torchaudio, pytorch_lightning, albumentations, omegaconf, scipy, timm, cv2, pycocotools; print\('all ok'\)" 2>&1)

import matplotlib, pandas, plotly, seaborn, sklearn, wandb, mlflow, tensorboard, hydra, kornia, supervision, ultralytics, ipykernel, fiftyone, labelme, PIL, tqdm, rich
